description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Check style that runs on push events to all branches except master, staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on pull requests. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job that checks out the repository, installs clang-format, and then checks code style by verifying clang-format version, running fix_style.py in dry-run mode, checking header guards, and updating languages.
